summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AVO Jerseys e-commerce platform. All backend APIs working (8/8 tests passed). All frontend features working: Popular Teams carousel (6/6 teams visible), 360° Jersey Viewer (all 5 views navigable, name/number customization working), Product cards (images, favorites, quick view all functional).
seed_data_creation: Created one test review for pytz verification (TEST_PytzVerify)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) pytz dependency fix verified - POST /api/reviews works, 2) Popular Teams carousel on homepage shows all 14 teams with logos, 3) 360° Jersey Viewer on Products page - all functionality tested including 5 views navigation, name input (max 15 chars), number input (max 2 digits), text overlay on back view, fullscreen toggle, close button, 4) Product cards work correctly with images, favorites, quick view

products_api.details: GET /api/products returns 98 products, filtering by category/team works

reviews_api_pytz_fix.details: POST /api/reviews works - pytz dependency fix verified, datetime operations successful

popular_teams_carousel.details: All 14 teams visible with logos (Real Madrid, Barcelona, etc.), horizontal scrolling works, click navigation works

360_preview_banner.details: Banner visible on Products page with 'NOU' tag, clickable to open modal

360_viewer_modal.details: Modal opens as overlay, shows Romania jersey, header with title and controls

360_viewer_5_views.details: All 5 views working: Față (front), Lateral (angle), Spate (back), Detaliu (flat), Display (hanging)

360_viewer_arrow_navigation.details: Previous/Next arrow buttons navigate between views correctly

360_viewer_dot_navigation.details: Tab/dot buttons for each view work correctly

360_viewer_name_input.details: Name input accepts text, max 15 characters enforced

360_viewer_number_input.details: Number input accepts digits only, max 2 digits enforced

360_viewer_text_overlay.details: When on 'Spate' view with name/number entered, text displays on jersey back

360_viewer_text_preview_panel.details: Preview panel shows entered name and number with styled text

360_viewer_fullscreen.details: Fullscreen toggle works, expands viewer to full viewport

product_cards_images.details: Product cards display images correctly with proper aspect ratio

product_cards_favorites.details: Favorite heart button works, toggles fill on click, toast notification shows

product_cards_quick_view.details: Quick View button appears on hover, opens modal with kit/size selection

screenshots: .screenshots/04_360_customization.png - 360° viewer with RONALDO #10 customization on back
.screenshots/07_products_page_final.png - Products page final state with favorites
